title: How should I feel about this
display_title: How should I feel about this
wikitext:
[]: How should I feel about this?             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon May 18, 2009 7:39 pm So my friend James and I are sitting in my room while he sets up our Rei cosplayers XBox Live account and I hear Cruel Angel Thesis...And it is not coming from our phones. Its my little sister, her text message sound is CAT. She knows the lyrics...I thought that was pretty cool.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 18, 2009 7:40 pm You should feel proud. Good job.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Mon May 18, 2009 7:53 pm Look at you. Look at how you shamelessly converted the innocent. My sister never took to Evangelion...most girls are into shojo. Though it's funny, since Evangelion delves into the mind but saves itself from shojodom by claiming that subjective problems can be dealt with by a change in perspective.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon May 18, 2009 7:59 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: You should feel proud. Good job.

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Mon May 18, 2009 7:59 pm You should feel awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon May 18, 2009 8:04 pm tell me how you did it please

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon May 18, 2009 8:10 pm Well when it comes to my friends, I believe they like it cause they fit the characters they cosplay but my sister...I'm not sure, shes seen a couple episodes..Maybe she did it so I would be her friend more or something, not that I'm not her friend cause I love my little sis. Girlfriend, Asuka for what has happen in her life Shinji, myself cause someone has to be the hotty Toji and Hikari/Mari, my good friend and his girlfriend..They both fit the characters. Kaworu, my best friend James..Looks just like him But my sister, not sure why..Maybe she just likes the tune or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 18, 2009 8:37 pm If she's only seen a couple of episodes... I'd say she would might like the tune. *pauses* Is she just getting into the series?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon May 18, 2009 8:56 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: If she's only seen a couple of episodes... I'd say she would might like the tune. *pauses* Is she just getting into the series?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 18, 2009 9:01 pm Lol. Who doesn't do the Gendo pose.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon May 18, 2009 9:02 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Lol. Who doesn't do the Gendo pose.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 18, 2009 9:03 pm Lol, doing the Gendo pose has become a complete habit on my part. I'm always doing it in class when I am quite and what not. Actually I think I might of done it before I've seen EVA. AH I DON'T REMEMBER!

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Mon May 18, 2009 10:58 pm Haha I still do the Gendo pose to this day. It makes me feel really important. Oh and by the way that's awesome your sister is into the show. I've tried but I've never been able to get anyone else hooked on the show. Most of my friends aren't into anime, but neither am I and I love the show.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon May 18, 2009 11:08 pm I've managed to get some of my friends to watch the show and they were just all like "It's weird. " However I have managed to get my dad into it. Good job by the way on getting your sister into Eva. Wish my sisters would even consider watching an anime. While on the subject of Gendo poses, I've been recently photoshoping everyone I know into the Gendo pose.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon May 18, 2009 11:14 pm theres nothing like the feeling you get when your sitting at a meeting with other anime nerds, doing the gendo pose and everyone understands it

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon May 18, 2009 11:38 pm I agree with you but I find it better when you are not in a group of fans and just with people, used to do it in College with my friends. Guess its alright when only like 2 people get it. Still..Well, sis wants to cosplay. She already started on some cosplays.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon May 18, 2009 11:51 pm Sounds like someone has an imouto complex. You should feel bad though. Poor girl...Do you really want her around people like these?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue May 19, 2009 12:00 am Atleast most of these people

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue May 19, 2009 12:22 am ZapalacX wrote: Sounds like someone has an imouto complex. You should feel bad though. Poor girl...Do you really want her around people like these?

[]: Re: How should I feel about this?             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Tue May 19, 2009 6:40 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I hear Cruel Angel Thesis...And it is not coming from our phones.
